tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with a cool blue glaze and a soft reflective finish.
tiles.creator: Amina Rahman
tiles.styleDescription: Minimal, coastal, and polished for modern interiors.

tiles.title: Terrazzo Sunburst
tiles.description: Warm terrazzo with golden accents and handcrafted speckled texture.
tiles.creator: Studio Nirmal
tiles.styleDescription: Artful, bright, and ideal for statement floors.

tiles.title: Mosaic Whisper
tiles.description: Soft mosaic tile with a layered pattern and airy neutral palette.
tiles.creator: Luna Tile Works
tiles.styleDescription: Quiet luxury with a handcrafted mosaic feel.

tiles.title: Modern Geometric Slate
tiles.description: Bold geometric slate tile with strong contrast and crisp edges.
tiles.creator: Atlas Surface Co.
tiles.styleDescription: Graphic, architectural, and made for feature walls.

tiles.title: Botanical Relief
tiles.description: Textured green tile inspired by botanical shadows and organic movement.
tiles.creator: Mira Ceramics
tiles.styleDescription: Nature-forward and calm with a sculpted surface.

tiles.title: Marble Ink Line
tiles.description: Elegant marble-look tile with dramatic ink-style veining.
tiles.creator: North Field Studio
tiles.styleDescription: Luxury with a bold monochrome rhythm.
